title: Day 21 Reflection
description: Honest Week 3 self-assessment before Week 4 interview simulation.

prompts.question: Did you finish within 150 minutes? What did you cut and why?
Which Week 3 topic slowed you most — Redux, RTK Query, auth, or dashboard?
prompts.guidance: Identify weak area for Day 22 revision.

prompts.question: Explain your state architecture choices without looking at code.
prompts.guidance: Theme vs Redux vs RTK Query separation.

prompts.question: What would you do differently in the first 15 minutes next time?
Are you ready for Day 22 machine coding interview simulation?
prompts.guidance: List 2 specific topics to revise tonight.
